channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Taylor Swift, Bad Bunny, Lady Gaga, Sabrina Carpenter, and R…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Taylor Swift, Bad Bunny, Lady Gaga, Sabrina Carpenter, and Raphael Saadiq are all nominated for Emmys
item.content:encoded: Taylor Swift, Bad Bunny, Lady Gaga, Sabrina Carpenter, and Raphael Saadiq are all nominated for Emmys

item.title: The Supreme Court annual financial reports shed light on the…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Supreme Court annual financial reports shed light on the justices' gifts, travel and personal lives. n.pr/4ycZliU
item.content:encoded: The Supreme Court annual financial reports shed light on the justices' gifts, travel and personal lives. n.pr/4ycZliU

item.title: The War and Treaty Are Through Playing Nashville’s Game "An…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
The War and Treaty Are Through Playing Nashville’s Game

"Any artist watching this, don’t you do that," says the Grammy-nominated duo, who just released their new album 'The Story of Michael and Tanya.'

Read: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
The War and Treaty Are Through Playing Nashville’s Game

"Any artist watching this, don’t you do that," says the Grammy-nominated duo, who just released their new album 'The Story of Michael and Tanya.'

Read: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...

item.title: What happens when a punk band throws out the rulebook? Debt …
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: What happens when a punk band throws out the rulebook? Debt Rag traded familiar formulas for experimentation, collaboration, and a whole new creative language. Read the story behind "It Is Clear What's Going On."
item.content:encoded: What happens when a punk band throws out the rulebook? Debt Rag traded familiar formulas for experimentation, collaboration, and a whole new creative language. Read the story behind "It Is Clear What's Going On."

item.title: Just days after tying the knot with Kansas City Chiefs playe…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Just days after tying the knot with Kansas City Chiefs player Travis Kelce, Taylor Swift has scored a total of five Emmy nominations at the 78th Emmy Awards.

This marks her first nods at the awards ceremony in more than a decade.

Read ↓
item.content:encoded:
Just days after tying the knot with Kansas City Chiefs player Travis Kelce, Taylor Swift has scored a total of five Emmy nominations at the 78th Emmy Awards.

This marks her first nods at the awards ceremony in more than a decade.

Read ↓

item.title: The passports feature an image of President Trump and are on…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The passports feature an image of President Trump and are only available in person at the Washington Passport Agency — and only by appointment. n.pr/4wxu0pE
item.content:encoded: The passports feature an image of President Trump and are only available in person at the Washington Passport Agency — and only by appointment. n.pr/4wxu0pE

item.title: The D.C. circuit appeals court denied all of President Trump…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The D.C. circuit appeals court denied all of President Trump's arguments that sought to stop the removal of his name from the Washington, D.C. arts institution. n.pr/3SNTbWt
item.content:encoded: The D.C. circuit appeals court denied all of President Trump's arguments that sought to stop the removal of his name from the Washington, D.C. arts institution. n.pr/3SNTbWt

item.title: Bad Bunny Gets the Last Laugh, Nabs Super Bowl Emmy Nod Afte…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Bad Bunny Gets the Last Laugh, Nabs Super Bowl Emmy Nod After Right-Wing Meltdown

Details ↓
item.content:encoded:
Bad Bunny Gets the Last Laugh, Nabs Super Bowl Emmy Nod After Right-Wing Meltdown

Details ↓

item.title: 'Hacks' set the record for most Emmy nominations for a singl…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
'Hacks' set the record for most Emmy nominations for a single season of a TV comedy. The series broke the record recently set by 'The Bear' and 'The Studio.'

More ↓
item.content:encoded:
'Hacks' set the record for most Emmy nominations for a single season of a TV comedy. The series broke the record recently set by 'The Bear' and 'The Studio.'

More ↓

item.title: The great singer-songwriter Madi Diaz announces new deluxe a…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: The great singer-songwriter Madi Diaz announces new deluxe album 'Fatal Optimist (UN-unplugged)' featuring Lucy Dacus and August Ponthier; hear her version of "This Is How A Woman Leaves," a song that she co-wrote with @marenmorris.bsky.social
item.content:encoded: The great singer-songwriter Madi Diaz announces new deluxe album 'Fatal Optimist (UN-unplugged)' featuring Lucy Dacus and August Ponthier; hear her version of "This Is How A Woman Leaves," a song that she co-wrote with @marenmorris.bsky.social

item.title: Hear Elanor Moss' gorgeous new single "The Way That It Feels…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Hear Elanor Moss' gorgeous new single "The Way That It Feels"
item.content:encoded: Hear Elanor Moss' gorgeous new single "The Way That It Feels"

item.title: Even though the U.S. and Mexico national soccer teams have b…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description:
Even though the U.S. and Mexico national soccer teams have been knocked out of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, their fans aren’t giving up on the tournament. Instead, they’re throwing their support behind other teams still in the competition.

via @laist.com
item.content:encoded:
Even though the U.S. and Mexico national soccer teams have been knocked out of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, their fans aren’t giving up on the tournament. Instead, they’re throwing their support behind other teams still in the competition.

via @laist.com

item.title: The body of 18-year-old Nolan Xavier Wells was found Monday …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The body of 18-year-old Nolan Xavier Wells was found Monday off Horn Island, Mississippi. That's where he was last seen with friends Saturday. Crump says the family is seeking answers. n.pr/4vkd5WC
item.content:encoded: The body of 18-year-old Nolan Xavier Wells was found Monday off Horn Island, Mississippi. That's where he was last seen with friends Saturday. Crump says the family is seeking answers. n.pr/4vkd5WC

item.title: Say Anything and Wavves announce collaborative album 'Cherry…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Say Anything and Wavves announce collaborative album 'Cherry Soda'; hear their new pop-punk anthem "Deathx1k"
item.content:encoded: Say Anything and Wavves announce collaborative album 'Cherry Soda'; hear their new pop-punk anthem "Deathx1k"

item.title: The International Olympic Committee decision effectively ove…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The International Olympic Committee decision effectively overturns a decade-long ban on Russian athletes from international sport imposed due to a state-sponsored doping scandal and Russia's full-scale invasion of Ukraine. n.pr/4f3KwGF
item.content:encoded: The International Olympic Committee decision effectively overturns a decade-long ban on Russian athletes from international sport imposed due to a state-sponsored doping scandal and Russia's full-scale invasion of Ukraine. n.pr/4f3KwGF

item.title: 'The Pitt' and 'Hacks' cemented their Emmy frontrunner statu…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
'The Pitt' and 'Hacks' cemented their Emmy frontrunner status, picking up 25 and 24 nominations, respectively, as the Television Academy announced the nominees for the 78th Annual Emmy Awards.

More ↓
item.content:encoded:
'The Pitt' and 'Hacks' cemented their Emmy frontrunner status, picking up 25 and 24 nominations, respectively, as the Television Academy announced the nominees for the 78th Annual Emmy Awards.

More ↓

item.content:encoded: Jack White and the Rolling Stones both have new albums dropping Friday. Some thoughts about both...

item.title: The rules of the midterms are being rewritten, from redistri…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The rules of the midterms are being rewritten, from redistricting to campaign money. Mother Jones journalist Ari Berman explains why President Trump seems "obsessed with the mechanics of voting." n.pr/4gnfCvn
item.content:encoded: The rules of the midterms are being rewritten, from redistricting to campaign money. Mother Jones journalist Ari Berman explains why President Trump seems "obsessed with the mechanics of voting." n.pr/4gnfCvn

item.title: Syria's Mar Musa monastery provides the tastiest mulberries,…

item.content:encoded: Syria's Mar Musa monastery provides the tastiest mulberries, and its services draw from Eastern Orthodox Christian and Sufi customs. n.pr/4y9OG8L

item.title: EXCLUSIVE: 'Madonna: Into the Groove' will chronicle the pop…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
EXCLUSIVE: 'Madonna: Into the Groove' will chronicle the pop icon's massive 1985, during which she embarked on her Virgin Tour, played Live Aid, and starred in 'Desperately Seeking Susan.'

Details: rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
EXCLUSIVE: 'Madonna: Into the Groove' will chronicle the pop icon's massive 1985, during which she embarked on her Virgin Tour, played Live Aid, and starred in 'Desperately Seeking Susan.'

Details: rollingstone.com/music/music-...

item.title: Former Maine state Sen. Troy Jackson has filed to replace Gr…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Former Maine state Sen. Troy Jackson has filed to replace Graham Platner on the U.S. Senate ballot in Maine after Platner's girlfriend accused him of sexual assault. n.pr/4fpGJ7Z
item.content:encoded: Former Maine state Sen. Troy Jackson has filed to replace Graham Platner on the U.S. Senate ballot in Maine after Platner's girlfriend accused him of sexual assault. n.pr/4fpGJ7Z

item.title: ‘Moana’ is Peak Disney Déjà Vu Why is the Mouse House still…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
‘Moana’ is Peak Disney Déjà Vu

item.content:encoded:

item.title: 日本語ラップ新譜紹介で知られる@kfp_harlandが、ヒップホップ作品の制作メンバーを無料で探せるデータベース「SQ…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
日本語ラップ新譜紹介で知られる@kfp_harlandが、ヒップホップ作品の制作メンバーを無料で探せるデータベース「SQADD」を立ち上げ

エンジニア、ビートメイカー、撮影・映像クリエイター、ライブDJなど、作品を一緒に作るメンバーをさまざまな条件から検索可能
https://natalie.mu/music/news/679085?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social
item.content:encoded:
日本語ラップ新譜紹介で知られる@kfp_harlandが、ヒップホップ作品の制作メンバーを無料で探せるデータベース「SQADD」を立ち上げ

エンジニア、ビートメイカー、撮影・映像クリエイター、ライブDJなど、作品を一緒に作るメンバーをさまざまな条件から検索可能

item.title: Asher White just announced new album 'Love Aggregates,' and …

item.title: Congo Square in New Orleans was one of the only places where…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Congo Square in New Orleans was one of the only places where, in the 18th and 19th centuries, enslaved Africans could gather. That legacy continues to shape the New Orleans — and its unique sound. n.pr/4p6YWKK
item.content:encoded: Congo Square in New Orleans was one of the only places where, in the 18th and 19th centuries, enslaved Africans could gather. That legacy continues to shape the New Orleans — and its unique sound. n.pr/4p6YWKK

item.title: The state Democratic Party accused Platner's campaign of try…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The state Democratic Party accused Platner's campaign of trying to "put their thumb on the scale" of the process to replace him if he drops his bid for Senate. Platner's team has denied doing so. n.pr/4eZiDja
item.content:encoded: The state Democratic Party accused Platner's campaign of trying to "put their thumb on the scale" of the process to replace him if he drops his bid for Senate. Platner's team has denied doing so. n.pr/4eZiDja

item.title: Public media was founded on a mission to create a more infor…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description:
Public media was founded on a mission to create a more informed public. As a nonprofit, we work for you.

We’re funded by you. Your support keeps journalists on the ground, asking questions, amplifying unheard voices and sharing powerful stories in service to the public.

Donate Now: n.pr/3SzxYze
item.content:encoded:
Public media was founded on a mission to create a more informed public. As a nonprofit, we work for you.

We’re funded by you. Your support keeps journalists on the ground, asking questions, amplifying unheard voices and sharing powerful stories in service to the public.

Donate Now: n.pr/3SzxYze
